title: Why Most FP&A Teams Are Building the Wrong Forecasting Model
notes: The obsession with accuracy vs. utility. A model that's right 80% of the time but never used is worse than one that's right 60% of the time but drives decisions.

title: The One Slide That Changes Every Board Presentation
notes: The assumptions slide — most teams bury it at the end. Front-loading it changes the entire conversation.

title: What Finance Teams Get Wrong About Partnering with the Business
notes: It's not about being a 'strategic partner' — it's about showing up with a point of view, not just data.
